vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on /var/log Directory
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /var/log, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0755 /var/log
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: find -H /var/log/ -maxdepth 0 -perm /u+s,g+ws,o+wt -type d -exec chmod u-s,g-ws,o-wt {} \;
vulnerability.group: Verify Permissions on Files within /var/log Directory

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes directory mode bits on /var/log. This does not affect authentication, networking, or boot processes and is a standard STIG file‑permission hardening step.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Improper permissions could expose log data to unauthorized users; Incorrect chmod syntax could leave the directory insecure
